每个小世界只有一个男主心不洁，其余男主全洁。
快穿世界一（1v2）：男主，你的假照网友哪有我骚？
原女主因不能接受亲密举动而不敢见面怎么办？
没关系，让骚骚的她去假扮女主和男主接吻不就好了。
快穿世界二（1v4）：恶女，贪婪女配拐走了你的失忆忠犬男主（末世）
每个恶女身边都有忠实的狗狗，复仇完狗狗就被丢弃了。不过没关系，女主你尽管去拯救世界去复仇！贪婪女配会在故事开始之前捡到他们领养的。
闷骚沉稳糙汉队长男主，捡走！
治愈妈妈型人夫男主，捡走！
花花公子实则纯情的男主，捡走！
诶？怎么还有一个失忆的。捡走！
快穿世界三（1v3）：万人嫌抢走了男主，钓系万人迷女主哭了。
抱歉了，沉迷管理鱼塘的女主
隔着一道门的距离，
男主正搂着小兔子亲…
快穿世界四（1v3）怎么都不喜欢小白花了，全都喜欢汉子茶？
汉子茶太撩人了，被小团队从小宠到大。
小白花作为外来者根本融入不进去。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/31deff05f431767022bfb0e03a5cda26","author":"伊丽傻白甜","author_id":"","book_id":"7596242669446106137","book_name":"快穿：小漂亮抢男人还深陷修罗场","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":865,"name":"忠犬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=865&name=忠犬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596243856580936217","read_count":"47726","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"294779"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"135","tags":"快穿,现代言情,豪门世家,系统,忠犬,总裁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ea2c983f92d1564d2e9ce231d7d95f61~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442945&x-signature=8b8MnIhIYU3USWugV2WbLUpk%2FFI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"420479849466608","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"76"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174224E9568999A9B0E6DE91DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur
